textByHash.63296b4f441feefabc3209665d407854ad3e1aeb: Of course! Even before our forefathers founded Kourend, under King Rada I, they remembered the tumult of the times when the armies of the gods laid waste to the lands.
textByHash.af9dc208dacda9ce6ad5e8aae8abbb4ec59d94ca: Sorry, there will be no sermon today, but you may offer a prayer to Saradomin yourself.
textByHash.ea8fbc0b5fc89c354923724806e7bab739ee7c95: We thank Saradomin for the end of that violent Age, and pray that he will continue to defend us from the evil other gods.
